name: Herbed Rice with Julienne Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the potatoes and cut them into julienne strips.
2. In a bowl, combine ginger root, chilies, coconut, parsley. Add a little water or soy milk and mix well.
3. Drop the potato strips into the mixture. Set aside.
4. Heat ghee in a heavy pot. Add whole cloves, cinnamon, bay leaf. Fry until cumin seeds turn brown.
5. Add the marinated potatoes and stir fry until lightly browned.
6. Add rice, salt, turmeric, lemon juice, water, and sugar to the pot. Stir and bring to a full boil quickly.
7. Reduce heat to very low and cover with a tight-fitting lid. Simmer gently for 20 to 25 minutes.
8. About 5 minutes before the end of cooking, add frozen peas.
9. Remove from heat and turn off the flame. Add 1 tbsp ghee. Let rice sit for 5 minutes.
10. Fluff the rice with a fork and garnish each portion with lemon wedges.
